title: Reminiscence Remoded
description: This modpack is focused to live a fantastic adventure in The Reminiscence SMP.
body:
# this modpack has been cancelled/postponed indefinitely
# What is this?
------------------------
This modpack is intended to give all members of The Reminiscence access to the SMP with mods that will take place in the coming months. 

# Who we are?
------------------------
The Reminiscence is a team dedicated mainly to minecraft (and other games) and is closed, you enter by invitation and subsequent evaluation of the admins.
